title: Kaizen MAX Settings
description: Schema for Kaizen MAX feature toggles and runtime configuration.

runtime_engine.description: Active runtime engine. ZeroClaw is the Rust-native default.

auto_spawn_subagents.description: Allow Kaizen to auto-spawn sub-agents without explicit user instruction.

main_chat_pinned.description: Keep Kaizen main chat always visible.

new_agent_chat_default_state.description: Default visibility state for newly spawned agent chat panels.

allow_direct_user_to_subagent_chat.description: Allow user to talk directly to sub-agents.

crystal_ball_enabled.description: Enable Crystal Ball AI:AI:HUMAN communication feed.

crystal_ball_default_open.description: Show Crystal Ball feed panel on startup.

mattermost_url.description: Mattermost server base URL for Crystal Ball bridge (set in UI Providers tab).

mattermost_channel_id.description: Mattermost channel ID used for Crystal Ball bridge messages.

selected_github_repo.description: Selected GitHub repository in owner/name format used by Workspace Hub.

hard_gates_enabled.description: Enforce hard review gates in the orchestration state machine.

require_human_smoke_test_before_deploy.description: Require human smoke test approval before deploy gate.

provider_inference_only.description: Use only provider-hosted inference APIs (no local model hosting).

credentials_ui_enabled.description: Show credential management section in settings UI.

oauth_ui_enabled.description: Show OAuth connect/disconnect controls in settings UI.

agent_name_editable_after_spawn.description: Allow renaming agents after they are spawned.

secrets_storage_mode.description: Storage backend for secrets. Only encrypted vault is supported.

write_plaintext_secrets_to_env.description: Write raw secret values to .env file. Must remain false for security.

show_only_masked_secrets_in_ui.description: Only display masked metadata for secrets in the UI. Must remain true for security.

inference_provider.description: Active LLM inference provider. API key must be stored in vault.

inference_model.description: Model identifier for the selected inference provider.

inference_temperature.description: Sampling temperature for inference (0 = deterministic, 1 = creative).
